content: Photography sourcing follows the documented chain — do not invent a new path: admin/SHIP_IMAGES_WIKIMEDIA_COMMONS.md (policy) -> admin/fetch-wiki-ship-images.py (fetch + per-ship wiki-attributions JSON) -> admin/update-ship-pages-with-wiki-images.js (apply to HTML) -> admin/IMAGE_ATTRIBUTION_TRACKING.md (audit). Scope the updater to only the ships that need it; re-running fleet-wide reintroduced broken refs from stale JSONs on 2026-05-13. Operator verbatim: 'there is some documentation somewhere regarding how we've done that in the past. careful, not clever.'
